natural_language: What is the total ECL by stage?
sql_query: SELECT stage, SUM(ecl_lifetime) AS total_ecl FROM ecl_provisions GROUP BY stage ORDER BY stage
description: Total lifetime ECL grouped by IFRS 9 stage.

natural_language: Show the NPL ratio for the corporate segment
sql_query: SELECT SUM(e.ead) FILTER (WHERE e.stage = 3) / NULLIF(SUM(e.ead), 0) AS npl_ratio FROM exposures e JOIN facilities f ON f.id = e.facility_id JOIN counterparties c ON c.id = f.counterparty_id WHERE c.segment = 'corporate'
description: Stage 3 EAD as a share of total EAD, corporate only.
